plans.cta_text: 加 LINE 領 48h 成交診斷

sample_gate_rows.source_surface: candidate Worker D1 / landing page analytics
sample_gate_rows.source_metric: page_view count by asset_id / content_id / variant_id
sample_gate_rows.evidence_rule: 只記 aggregate page views；不要存 IP、User-Agent、個人識別。
sample_gate_rows.pii_rule: Do not paste IP, User-Agent, session rows, or visitor identifiers.

sample_gate_rows.source_surface: candidate Worker D1 / landing page analytics
sample_gate_rows.source_metric: cta_click count by asset_id / content_id / variant_id
sample_gate_rows.evidence_rule: 只記 aggregate CTA clicks；不要存個別 session 明細。
sample_gate_rows.pii_rule: Do not paste IP, User-Agent, session rows, or visitor identifiers.

sample_gate_rows.source_surface: LINE OA 管理後台 / inbound customer-service aggregate
sample_gate_rows.source_metric: line_add aggregate count by tracking context
sample_gate_rows.evidence_rule: 只記新增數或進線數；不要貼 LINE user id、暱稱、聊天內容。
sample_gate_rows.pii_rule: Do not paste LINE user IDs, names, chat text, notes, or customer rows.

north_star_capture_rows.source_surface: candidate Worker D1 / tracking redirect aggregate
north_star_capture_rows.source_metric: link_click aggregate count by content_id / variant_id
north_star_capture_rows.evidence_rule: Only aggregate link_click counts; do not store session rows, IP, User-Agent, or visitor identifiers.
north_star_capture_rows.pii_rule: Aggregate counts only. No visitor identifiers.

north_star_capture_rows.source_surface: candidate Worker D1 / landing page analytics
north_star_capture_rows.source_metric: page_view count by asset_id / content_id / variant_id
north_star_capture_rows.evidence_rule: 只記 aggregate page views；不要存 IP、User-Agent、個人識別。
north_star_capture_rows.pii_rule: Do not paste IP, User-Agent, session rows, or visitor identifiers.

north_star_capture_rows.source_surface: candidate Worker D1 / landing page analytics
north_star_capture_rows.source_metric: cta_click count by asset_id / content_id / variant_id
north_star_capture_rows.evidence_rule: 只記 aggregate CTA clicks；不要存個別 session 明細。
north_star_capture_rows.pii_rule: Do not paste IP, User-Agent, session rows, or visitor identifiers.

north_star_capture_rows.source_surface: LINE OA 管理後台 / inbound customer-service aggregate
north_star_capture_rows.source_metric: line_add aggregate count by tracking context
north_star_capture_rows.evidence_rule: 只記新增數或進線數；不要貼 LINE user id、暱稱、聊天內容。
north_star_capture_rows.pii_rule: Do not paste LINE user IDs, names, chat text, notes, or customer rows.

north_star_capture_rows.source_surface: LINE OA 管理後台 / inbound customer-service aggregate
north_star_capture_rows.source_metric: lead_submit aggregate count by content_id / variant_id
north_star_capture_rows.evidence_rule: Add one aggregate lead_submit count only after business context is sufficient. Do not copy the conversation into local files.
north_star_capture_rows.pii_rule: Do not paste LINE user IDs, names, chat text, notes, phone, email, payment data, order IDs, or customer rows.

north_star_capture_rows.source_surface: LINE OA 管理後台 / inbound customer-service aggregate
north_star_capture_rows.source_metric: deal aggregate count by content_id / variant_id
north_star_capture_rows.evidence_rule: Add one aggregate deal count only after owner confirmation. Never process ECPay or payment actions here.
north_star_capture_rows.pii_rule: Do not paste LINE user IDs, names, chat text, notes, phone, email, payment data, order IDs, or customer rows.

north_star_capture_rows.source_surface: LINE OA 管理後台 / inbound customer-service aggregate
north_star_capture_rows.source_metric: quality_flag aggregate count by content_id / variant_id
north_star_capture_rows.evidence_rule: Add aggregate quality_flag with quality_score only. Do not store the reason text if it contains customer details.
north_star_capture_rows.pii_rule: Do not paste LINE user IDs, names, chat text, notes, phone, email, payment data, order IDs, or customer rows.

observation_checkpoints.owner_action: If approved, manually publish exactly one packet and record the surface plus timestamp outside this runner.
observation_checkpoints.automation_action: No automatic post, schedule, public-link change, LINE push, or deploy.

observation_checkpoints.owner_action: Collect aggregate page_view, cta_click, and line_add counts for this packet only.
Refresh aggregate counts, then run the local owner sample-gate and North Star checks.
